meaning: n.轻重量级拳击手,重量级拳击手
examples: "I've been following Adamek's career pretty closely," he said. "the guy is the best cruiserweight in the world."
The former IBF Cruiserweight Champion said he has no interest in dropping back down to that weight class.
Cruiserweight Maccarinelli just beat an eight count before getting to his feet, only to be sent crashing again.
Former undisputed cruiserweight champion Haye, 28, pointed to Klitschko's six title defences as evidence to back up his claims.
